title: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show
display_title: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show
wikitext:
[]: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show             Quote Post by lookingformyintimacy » Fri Apr 04, 2025 1:30 pm Basically, recently I've been considering to maybe rewatch the NGE series, but thing is, I'm too anxious and just feel uneasy to even try rewatching it. Because last time I first watched it, it screwed me up pretty bad, still feeling it unfortunately. Dont get me wrong, I really liked Evangelion, its just I cant bring myself to try and even rewatch it. And even if I had the courage to rewatch it, I feel like it would be too soon, since I only first watched it last late october/december. I'm saying this here because I feel like some people here might relate I guess, I'm not even sure how to get rid of this feeling, I hate it.

[]: Re: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Apr 05, 2025 7:58 am Watch the other anime Anno directed kid. Anno's a sucker for happy endings. They'll help you move on.

[]: Re: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show             Quote Post by lookingformyintimacy » Tue Apr 08, 2025 3:53 pm C.A.P. wrote: Watch the other anime Anno directed kid. Anno's a sucker for happy endings. They'll help you move on.

Article: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show
[]: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show             Quote Post by lookingformyintimacy » Fri Apr 04, 2025 1:30 pm Basically, recently I've been considering to maybe rewatch the NGE series, but thing is, I'm too anxious and just feel uneasy to even try rewatching it. Because last time I first watched it, it screwed me up pretty bad, still feeling it unfortunately. Dont get me wrong, I really liked Evangelion, its just I cant bring myself to try and even rewatch it. And even if I had the courage to rewatch it, I feel like it would be too soon, since I only first watched it last late october/december. I'm saying this here because I feel like some people here might relate I guess, I'm not even sure how to get rid of this feeling, I hate it.

[]: Re: Too anxious to rewatch the evangelion show             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Apr 05, 2025 7:58 am Watch the other anime Anno directed kid. Anno's a sucker for happy endings. They'll help you move on.
